---
title: "WRDS - Compustat"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - Compustat

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

Comprehensive financial and accounting database covering publicly traded companies. Includes income statements, balance sheets, cash flows, and company fundamentals for quantitative research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Trade & Supply Chain Data
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Trade & Supply Chain Data

## Access notes

An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/login/?next=/pages/get-data/compustat-capital-iq-standard-poors/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
